local_results.title: Eastern Promenade Trail
local_results.description: Scenic waterside trail that leads to a beach that’s dog-friendly.
local_results.user_review: "The trail is clean and well maintained."

local_results.title: Back Cove Park
local_results.description: Waterfront multiuse trail & green space. Large park featuring a 3.5-mile, waterfront loop trail for jogging & biking, plus open green space.

local_results.title: Back Cove Trail
local_results.user_review: "Very well maintained trail loop (about 3 miles) around Back Cove."

local_results.title: Fore River Sanctuary
local_results.description: Tranquil hiking trail with a waterfall winding through woods, marsh and bridges.
local_results.user_review: "Beautiful wooded trail system right in the heart of Portland."

local_results.title: Brook Trail
local_results.user_review: "Water view, unpaved wide trail and small parking lot behind Payson Park"

local_results.title: Back Cove Trail Parking
local_results.description: Recreational area offering walking, running, and hiking trails.

local_results.title: Mayor Baxter Woods
local_results.description: Leafy nature preserve with walking paths. Pine forested, dog-friendly park offering shaded trails for walking, running & cycling.

local_results.title: Presumpscot River Preserve
local_results.description: Tranquil riverside park with a waterfall, hiking trails, for-leash dogs and open spaces.
local_results.user_review: "Easy, well marked, and well maintained trails."

local_results.title: Western Promenade
local_results.description: Elevated park with trails & scenic views. 18.1-acre park featuring scenic trails around bluffs, plus statues & stately 19th-century homes.
local_results.user_review: "Very pretty, historic homes, well maintained walking/ running surface."

local_results.title: Eastern Promenade Midslope Trail
local_results.user_review: "Short but nice trail, intersects with the eastern promenade trail I believe."

local_results.title: Oat Nuts Park Trail
local_results.description: Park featuring hiking and cycling trails plus views of the Presumpscot River.

local_results.title: Canco Woods Trails
local_results.address: Running / Biking Path from Canco to Torrey, Portland, ME 04103

local_results.title: Fort Allen Park
local_results.description: Historic, tranquil waterfront promenade. This grassy spot with water views features seating areas, a gazebo & many historical monuments.
local_results.user_review: "Very long trail and spread out, great view of the ocean."

local_results.title: The Eastern Trail
local_results.description: Flat, graveled former rail track with scenic views of the Scarborough Marsh, a wildlife refuge known for birds.

local_results.title: Robinson Woods Preserve
local_results.description: Serene walking trail through woodlands. Quiet walking trail winding through a nature reserve with mature pine & oak trees, ponds & wildlife.

local_results.title: Bug Light Park
local_results.description: Open green space & a historic lighthouse. Nearly 9 acres of green space with harbor & skyline views, plus a tiny lighthouse built in 1875.
local_results.user_review: "The paths are paved and well maintained."
